sections.paragraph:
m. pl. יְעֵלִים const. יַעֲלֵי-

(1) the ibex, perhaps also the chamois. Arab. وَعِلُ and وَعْلُ, Psa 104:18 Job 39:1. Comp. Bochart, Hieroz. P. I, p. 915, seq. צוּרֵי הַיְּעֵלִים the rocks of the wild goats, near the desert of Engedi, 1Sa 24:3.

(2) [Jael], pr.n.-(a) of a judge [?] or heroic person of Israel, before the time of Deborah, Jud. 5:6 . [This is surely the same as the next.]-(b) of a resolute woman, the wife of Heber the Kenite, Jud. 4:17 , 18 Jdg 4:18 5:24 . Some understand the same to be spoken of 5:6 [of course they are the same.]
